# Phase 5: Reflow Engine Correctness + Undo Reliability

## Phase Work
- [Phase 1: Miscellaneous Bugs, Features, and Cleanup](06.misc-bugs-features.md) (Complete)
- [Phase 2: Post-Implementation Bug Fixes](06.misc-bugs-features.02.md) (Complete)
- [Phase 3: Additional Misc Bugs & Features](06.misc-bugs-features.03.md) (Complete)
- [Phase 4: XML Comment Editing — Reflow & Edit Bugs](06.misc-bugs-features.04.md) (Complete)
- [Phase 5: Reflow Engine Correctness + Undo Reliability](06.misc-bugs-features.05.md) (Complete)

---

## Context

After Plan 06.04, testing with real-world multi-`<para>` comment blocks revealed several reflow engine bugs — including catastrophic content duplication — and the manual "Reflow Current Comment" command requiring two Ctrl+Z to undo. The user provided a before/after example of a `<summary>` block with multiple `<para>` elements that demonstrated all the issues.

---

## Items In Scope

### Item 1 — Pre-Normalize Inline Multi-Element Lines

**Problem:** When `</para> <para>` appears on the same line, the reflow engine processes the content multiple times, causing catastrophic content duplication.

**Fix:** Add `normalizeLines()` function that splits lines at block-tag boundaries (e.g., `"text</para> <para>more"` → `["text</para>", "<para>more"]`) before the main reflow loop runs. Lines that don't need splitting are preserved as-is (keeping indentation for `<code>` blocks).

**Files:** `src/reflow/reflowEngine.ts`

---

### Item 2 — Fix `endCloseMatch` Continue Bug

**Problem:** The `continue` statement after an `endCloseMatch` inside the inline-open-tag handler re-entered the inner content loop past the closing tag, causing runaway processing and duplicate content.

**Fix:** Restructured the inline-open-tag handler to correctly break out of the inner content collection loop when the closing tag is found, rather than using `continue` which re-entered the wrong loop.

**Files:** `src/reflow/reflowEngine.ts`

---

### Item 3 — Blank-Before-`<para>` Logic

**Problem:** Blank lines were incorrectly inserted after opening block tags (e.g., blank after `<summary>`) and between consecutive `<para>` elements.

**Fix:** Added `shouldInsertParaSeparator()` function. Only inserts a separator when preceded by plain text; suppresses after opening block tags and after closing block tags. Also strips blank lines between block-close and block-open in the outer loop.

**Files:** `src/reflow/reflowEngine.ts`

---

### Item 4 — Remove `<remarks>` from `alwaysMultiLine`

**Problem:** `<remarks>` was incorrectly forced to multi-line form alongside `<summary>`.

**Fix:** Only `<summary>` is forced to multi-line form; all other tags follow rule-1 (inline open = inline close).

**Files:** `src/reflow/reflowEngine.ts`

---

### Item 5 — Inline-Close Placement for Multi-Line Wrap

**Problem:** When an opening tag had content on the same line in the source, the closing tag was emitted on its own line even when it should be appended to the last wrapped content line.

**Fix:** When the opening tag had inline content in the source, the closing tag is appended to the last wrapped content line instead of being emitted separately.

**Files:** `src/reflow/reflowEngine.ts`

---

### Item 6 — Fix Manual Reflow Undo (Two Ctrl+Z Required)

**Problem:** The manual "Reflow Current Comment" command required two Ctrl+Z to undo. The first undo appeared to do nothing. After double-undo, redo and undo were each a single action — consistent with two undo entries where the second is invisible.

**Root cause:** `SmartPasteHandler.handleChange()` did not check the `isAutoReflowEdit` flag. When the manual reflow command replaced a comment block via `editor.edit()` (a multi-line text replacement), SmartPasteHandler's paste heuristic (`c.text.length >= 2 && c.text.includes('\n')`) classified it as a paste event and scheduled a debounced reflow 100ms later. This second reflow created a phantom undo entry.

Secondary contributing factor: `AutoReflowHandler`'s dirty tracker was not cleared after manual reflow, meaning cursor-leave could also trigger a redundant auto-reflow pass.

**Fix (commit cb3c8f0):** Wrapped `editor.edit()` with `setAutoReflowEdit(true/false)` so `AutoReflowHandler.handleChange` skips the manual reflow edit.

**Fix (post cb3c8f0, attempt 1):** Added `clearAutoReflowDirty(docUri)` to clear the dirty tracker after manual reflow completes — addressed the secondary cause but not the primary one (SmartPasteHandler).

**Fix (post cb3c8f0, attempt 2 — actual fix):** Added `isAutoReflowEdit` check to `SmartPasteHandler.handleChange()`. When any programmatic reflow edit is in progress, SmartPasteHandler now skips the change event entirely, preventing the debounced paste-reflow from firing.

**Files:** `src/extension.ts`, `src/reflow/autoReflow.ts`, `src/reflow/smartPaste.ts`

---

## Notes

- 222 tests pass after all changes (2 new regression tests added for content duplication and inline-close placement).
- The `normalizeLines()` function is called from `reflowXmlContent()`, ensuring both `reflowCommentBlock()` and direct test calls go through normalization.

---

## Implementation Complete

**Commit:** `cb3c8f0` (engine fixes + initial undo fix)

### Evidence

`npm run compile` → exit 0 (no TypeScript errors)
`npm test` → **222/222 tests passed** (11 test files, 0 failures)

### Summary of Changes

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `src/reflow/reflowEngine.ts` | Added `normalizeLines()` for pre-splitting multi-element lines. Added `shouldInsertParaSeparator()` for smart blank-line insertion. Added `findNextNonEmpty()` helper. Fixed `endCloseMatch` continue bug. Removed `<remarks>` from `alwaysMultiLine`. Fixed inline-close placement for multi-line wrap. Reworked blank-line handling in outer loop to strip blanks between block-close/open. |
| `src/extension.ts` | Changed `reflowComment` command handler from sync to async. Wrapped `editor.edit()` with `setAutoReflowEdit(true/false)`. Added `clearAutoReflowDirty()` call after manual reflow to prevent cursor-leave auto-reflow. |
| `src/reflow/autoReflow.ts` | Added `setAutoReflowEdit()` export function. Added `clearDirty()` method on `AutoReflowHandler`. Added `clearAutoReflowDirty()` module-level function via singleton pattern. |
| `src/reflow/smartPaste.ts` | Added `isAutoReflowEdit` guard to `handleChange()` — skips paste detection when a programmatic reflow edit is in progress, preventing SmartPasteHandler from creating a phantom second undo entry. |
| `test/unit/reflowEngine.test.ts` | 2 new regression tests for content duplication and inline-close placement scenarios. |
